requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 EV Conductive Charging Safety — Ghana National Standard (GS IEC 61851 Series)
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851电动汽车导线式充电安全——加纳国家标准（GS IEC 61851系列）
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851電動汽車導線式充電安全——加納國家標準（GS IEC 61851系列）

summary.en: Ghana has adopted the IEC 61851 series as the national standard for electric vehicle conductive charging systems, designated as GS IEC 61851. IEC 61851-1 covers general requirements for EV supply equipment (EVSE), IEC 61851-21 and -22 cover DC and AC charging station requirements, and IEC 61851-23:2023 is the current benchmark for DC fast charging stations. Ghana's Energy Commission has signalled alignment with IEC 61851 to ensure interoperability across global charging ecosystems. Ghana's emerging national EV standards framework includes the GS IEC 61851 series as the safety and functional reference for EV charger imports and installations.
summary.zh: 加纳已将IEC 61851系列纳入电动汽车导线式充电系统国家标准，指定为GS IEC 61851。IEC 61851-1涵盖电动汽车供电设备（EVSE）通用要求，IEC 61851-21和-22涵盖直流和交流充电站要求，IEC 61851-23:2023是直流快速充电站的现行基准标准。加纳能源委员会已表明与IEC 61851保持一致，以确保全球充电生态系统的互操作性。加纳新兴国家EV标准框架以GS IEC 61851系列作为EV充电设备进口和安装的安全与功能参照。
summary.zht: 加納已將IEC 61851系列納入電動汽車導線式充電系統國家標準，指定為GS IEC 61851。IEC 61851-1涵蓋電動汽車供電設備（EVSE）通用要求，IEC 61851-21和-22涵蓋直流和交流充電站要求，IEC 61851-23:2023是直流快速充電站的現行基準標準。加納能源委員會已表明與IEC 61851保持一致，以確保全球充電生態系統的互操作性。加納新興國家EV標準框架以GS IEC 61851系列作為EV充電設備進口和安裝的安全與功能參照。

standards_or_laws: GS IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (Ghana adoption)
IEC 61851-23:2023 — DC EV supply equipment (international reference)
Ghana Energy Commission national EV standards framework

summary.en: Chinese EV chargers are commonly certified to GB/T 18487 (electric vehicle conductive charging system), which is technically derived from IEC 61851 but includes Chinese-specific modifications and deviations. A GB/T 18487 test report is not equivalent to a GS IEC 61851 conformity report for Ghana. Where the Chinese manufacturer holds an IECEE CB test report based on IEC 61851-1 or IEC 61851-23, this is more useful for Ghana conformity assessment than a GB/T 18487 report alone.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备通常依据GB/T 18487（电动汽车传导充电系统）认证，该标准技术上源自IEC 61851，但包含中国特定修改和偏差。GB/T 18487测试报告不等同于加纳的GS IEC 61851符合性报告。若中国制造商持有基于IEC 61851-1或IEC 61851-23的IECEE CB测试报告，则比单独的GB/T 18487报告更有助于加纳符合性评定。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備通常依據GB/T 18487（電動汽車傳導充電系統）認證，該標準技術上源自IEC 61851，但包含中國特定修改和偏差。GB/T 18487測試報告不等同於加納的GS IEC 61851符合性報告。若中國製造商持有基於IEC 61851-1或IEC 61851-23的IECEE CB測試報告，則比單獨的GB/T 18487報告更有助於加納符合性評定。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2015 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
GB/T 18487.2-2017 — Part 2: AC/DC supply equipment
IECEE CB report based on IEC 61851 (if held by manufacturer)

gap.en: Chinese exporters should obtain or verify IEC 61851-based IECEE CB test reports for their charger models. A GB/T 18487 report alone does not demonstrate GS IEC 61851 compliance for Ghana. Where only a GB/T 18487 report exists, supplemental testing or gap analysis against IEC 61851 requirements should be conducted by an accredited laboratory.
gap.zh: 中国出口商应取得或核实其充电设备型号基于IEC 61851的IECEE CB测试报告。单独的GB/T 18487报告不能证明符合加纳GS IEC 61851要求。若仅有GB/T 18487报告，应由认可实验室进行补充测试或针对IEC 61851要求的差距分析。
gap.zht: 中國出口商應取得或核實其充電設備型號基於IEC 61851的IECEE CB測試報告。單獨的GB/T 18487報告不能證明符合加納GS IEC 61851要求。若僅有GB/T 18487報告，應由認可實驗室進行補充測試或針對IEC 61851要求的差距分析。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory as the applicable national safety standard (GS IEC 61851) for EV chargers in Ghana; enforced through GSA conformity assessment and Energy Commission authorization
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 is a mandatory standard for EV conductive charging systems installed and sold in China

source.publisher: GBC Ghana Online — Ghana EV charger national standards announcement

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ghana has adopted GS IEC 61851 as the national EV charger safety standard. Chinese GB/T 18487 certification does not substitute; an IEC 61851-based IECEE CB report is the most portable supporting document for Ghana conformity assessment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 加纳已采用GS IEC 61851作为国家EV充电设备安全标准。中国GB/T 18487认证不能替代；基于IEC 61851的IECEE CB报告是加纳符合性评定最具通用性的支持文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 加納已採用GS IEC 61851作為國家EV充電設備安全標準。中國GB/T 18487認證不能替代；基於IEC 61851的IECEE CB報告是加納符合性評定最具通用性的支持文件。

requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — IEC 62196 (Type 2 / CCS) vs GB/T 20234 in Ghana
requirement_topic.zh: 连接器互操作性——加纳IEC 62196（Type 2 / CCS）对比GB/T 20234
requirement_topic.zht: 連接器互操作性——加納IEC 62196（Type 2 / CCS）對比GB/T 20234

summary.en: Ghana's Energy Commission has signalled a policy preference for IEC 62196-based connectors (Type 2 AC, Type 2 Combo / CCS DC) to ensure interoperability with international EV models prevalent in Ghana's growing EV fleet (including European, Japanese, and US-origin vehicles). This approach is intended to avoid 'technological lock-in' and keep the Ghanaian market accessible to multiple global EV manufacturers and charging operators. Ghana is introducing national standards for EV chargers and batteries that align with the IEC 62196 connector ecosystem, not the GB/T 20234 connector standard used in Chinese domestic chargers.
summary.zh: 加纳能源委员会已表明政策上倾向IEC 62196连接器（AC Type 2、DC Type 2 Combo / CCS），以确保与加纳日益增长的EV车队中普遍存在的国际EV车型（包括欧洲、日本和美国产车辆）的互操作性。此举旨在避免「技术锁定」，保持加纳市场对多个全球EV制造商和充电运营商的开放性。加纳正引入与IEC 62196连接器生态系统保持一致的EV充电设备和电池国家标准，而非中国国内充电设备采用的GB/T 20234连接器标准。
summary.zht: 加納能源委員會已表明政策上傾向IEC 62196連接器（AC Type 2、DC Type 2 Combo / CCS），以確保與加納日益增長的EV車隊中普遍存在的國際EV車型（包括歐洲、日本和美國產車輛）的互操作性。此舉旨在避免「技術鎖定」，保持加納市場對多個全球EV製造商和充電運營商的開放性。加納正引入與IEC 62196連接器生態系統保持一致的EV充電設備和電池國家標準，而非中國國內充電設備採用的GB/T 20234連接器標準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-1:2022 — Plugs, socket-outlets, vehicle connectors and vehicle inlets — Conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62196-2 — Type 2 AC connectors
IEC 62196-3 — DC vehicle connectors (Type 2 Combo / CCS)
Ghana Energy Commission EV infrastructure policy — IEC 62196 alignment signal

summary.en: Chinese domestic EV chargers use the GB/T 20234 connector standard (GB/T 20234.1 for AC, GB/T 20234.2 for DC), which is not compatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS connectors. Chinese manufacturers exporting to IEC 62196 markets must supply chargers with IEC 62196-compatible connectors or offer a dual-connector variant. Presenting a GB/T 20234 connector as IEC 62196 compatible is incorrect and will result in incompatible deployments in the Ghanaian market.
summary.zh: 中国国内电动汽车充电设备采用GB/T 20234连接器标准（GB/T 20234.1用于交流，GB/T 20234.2用于直流），与IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS连接器不兼容。中国制造商出口至IEC 62196市场时，须提供配备IEC 62196兼容连接器的充电设备或提供双连接器版本。将GB/T 20234连接器标榜为IEC 62196兼容是错误的，将导致在加纳市场部署不兼容设备。
summary.zht: 中國國內電動汽車充電設備採用GB/T 20234連接器標準（GB/T 20234.1用於交流，GB/T 20234.2用於直流），與IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS連接器不兼容。中國製造商出口至IEC 62196市場時，須提供配備IEC 62196兼容連接器的充電設備或提供雙連接器版本。將GB/T 20234連接器標榜為IEC 62196兼容是錯誤的，將導致在加納市場部署不兼容設備。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.1-2015 — AC connector for EV conductive charging (Chinese domestic)
GB/T 20234.2-2015 — DC connector for EV conductive charging (Chinese domestic)
GB/T 20234.3-2015 — DC connector for high-power EV charging (Chinese domestic)

gap.en: Chinese exporters must supply EV chargers with IEC 62196-compatible connectors (Type 2 AC and/or CCS DC) for the Ghanaian market, not GB/T 20234 connectors. Charger hardware, firmware, and pilot signal logic must be validated against IEC 61851 and IEC 62196 requirements. Exporters should not ship Chinese-domestic-connector variants to Ghana without explicit confirmation from the Ghanaian buyer that the fleet they serve uses GB/T connectors.
gap.zh: 中国出口商须为加纳市场提供配备IEC 62196兼容连接器（AC Type 2和/或DC CCS）的电动汽车充电设备，而非GB/T 20234连接器。充电设备硬件、固件和导引信号逻辑须经IEC 61851和IEC 62196要求验证。出口商不应在未经加纳买家明确确认其服务车队使用GB/T连接器的情况下，向加纳发运中国国内连接器版本产品。
gap.zht: 中國出口商須為加納市場提供配備IEC 62196兼容連接器（AC Type 2和/或DC CCS）的電動汽車充電設備，而非GB/T 20234連接器。充電設備硬件、固件和導引信號邏輯須經IEC 61851和IEC 62196要求驗證。出口商不應在未經加納買家明確確認其服務車隊使用GB/T連接器的情況下，向加納發運中國國內連接器版本產品。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory interoperability requirement under Ghana Energy Commission EV infrastructure policy; IEC 62196 connector alignment required for market-deployable chargers
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 is mandatory for EV chargers in the Chinese domestic market; not applicable to IEC 62196 export variants

source.publisher: Ghana Energy Commission — EV Charging Station Regulation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ghana's EV infrastructure policy mandates IEC 62196 connector interoperability, creating a fundamental incompatibility with GB/T 20234 connectors on Chinese domestic chargers. Chinese exporters must supply IEC 62196-equipped variants for Ghana deployments.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 加纳EV基础设施政策要求IEC 62196连接器互操作性，与中国国内充电设备的GB/T 20234连接器存在根本性不兼容。中国出口商须为加纳部署提供配备IEC 62196的版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 加納EV基礎設施政策要求IEC 62196連接器互操作性，與中國國內充電設備的GB/T 20234連接器存在根本性不兼容。中國出口商須為加納部署提供配備IEC 62196的版本。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Commission Prior Authorization for EV Charging Station Installation and Operation
requirement_topic.zh: 能源委员会电动汽车充电站安装与运营事先授权
requirement_topic.zht: 能源委員會電動汽車充電站安裝與運營事先授權

summary.en: The Ghana Energy Commission has issued a regulatory directive (under Energy Commission Act 1997, Act 541) requiring that any individual, company, or organisation intending to install, operate, or offer EV charging and battery swap services in Ghana must first obtain the requisite authorisation or certification from the Energy Commission before commencing. This directive applies to all EV charging station operators, whether public or private. Operating without prior Energy Commission authorization is non-compliant with Ghana energy law. The Commission also intends to develop formal standards and regulations for EV charging infrastructure.
summary.zh: 加纳能源委员会依据《1997年能源委员会法》（第541章）发出监管指令，要求任何拟在加纳安装、运营或提供电动汽车充电和换电服务的个人、公司或机构，须在开始运营前向能源委员会取得所需授权或认证。该指令适用于所有电动汽车充电站运营商，无论公共或私人性质。未经能源委员会事先授权运营，违反加纳能源法。委员会亦计划制定电动汽车充电基础设施的正式标准和法规。
summary.zht: 加納能源委員會依據《1997年能源委員會法》（第541章）發出監管指令，要求任何擬在加納安裝、運營或提供電動汽車充電和換電服務的個人、公司或機構，須在開始運營前向能源委員會取得所需授權或認證。該指令適用於所有電動汽車充電站運營商，無論公共或私人性質。未經能源委員會事先授權運營，違反加納能源法。委員會亦計劃制定電動汽車充電基礎設施的正式標準和法規。

standards_or_laws: Energy Commission Act, 1997 (Act 541) — energy infrastructure authorization
Ghana Energy Commission EV Charging Station Regulation directive (2024)
Ghana National Electric Vehicle Policy (forthcoming, 2024–2026 preparatory stage)

summary.en: In China, EV charging station operators must comply with national grid-code, safety, and installation regulations including GB/T 18487 and related standards, and coordinate with the local distribution network operator for grid connection. There is no direct Chinese equivalent to Ghana's Energy Commission prior-authorization requirement; this is a Ghana-specific regulatory obligation that must be addressed locally by the charging station operator or project developer.
summary.zh: 在中国，电动汽车充电站运营商须遵守包括GB/T 18487及相关标准在内的国家电网规范、安全和安装法规，并与当地配电网运营商协调并网事宜。中国没有与加纳能源委员会事先授权要求直接对应的规定；这是一项加纳特有的监管义务，须由充电站运营商或项目开发商在当地处理。
summary.zht: 在中國，電動汽車充電站運營商須遵守包括GB/T 18487及相關標準在內的國家電網規範、安全和安裝法規，並與當地配電網運營商協調併網事宜。中國沒有與加納能源委員會事先授權要求直接對應的規定；這是一項加納特有的監管義務，須由充電站運營商或項目開發商在當地處理。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487 (Chinese domestic EVSE standard — not applicable to Ghana authorization requirement)
No direct Chinese equivalent for Energy Commission prior authorization

gap.en: EV charger exporters and their Ghanaian customers must ensure the charging station operator or project developer has obtained Energy Commission authorization before the installation goes live. The exporter should communicate this obligation to the buyer and confirm in the sales contract that the buyer is responsible for obtaining and maintaining Energy Commission authorizations. Chargers should not be shipped for immediate commissioning without confirming this authorization is in place.
gap.zh: 电动汽车充电设备出口商及其加纳客户须确保充电站运营商或项目开发商在安装投运前已取得能源委员会授权。出口商应将此义务告知买方，并在销售合同中确认买方负责取得和维持能源委员会授权。在确认授权到位前，不应发运用于立即投运的充电设备。
gap.zht: 電動汽車充電設備出口商及其加納客戶須確保充電站運營商或項目開發商在安裝投運前已取得能源委員會授權。出口商應將此義務告知買方，並在銷售合同中確認買方負責取得和維持能源委員會授權。在確認授權到位前，不應發運用於立即投運的充電設備。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory: Energy Commission prior authorization required before installation or operation of any EV charging station in Ghana under Act 541
mandatory_status.cn: No direct equivalent; Chinese domestic EVSE installation follows national grid-code and safety standards, not a pre-authorization licensing model

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Energy Commission prior authorization is mandatory before any EV charging station can be installed or operated in Ghana. This is a site-operator obligation that the Chinese exporter must communicate to the Ghanaian buyer and confirm is addressed before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在加纳安装或运营任何电动汽车充电站前，须强制取得能源委员会事先授权。这是场地运营商的义务，中国出口商须告知加纳买方，并在投运前确认已落实。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在加納安裝或運營任何電動汽車充電站前，須強制取得能源委員會事先授權。這是場地運營商的義務，中國出口商須告知加納買方，並在投運前確認已落實。

requirement_topic.en: GSA Conformity Assessment and 50 Hz ECG Grid Compatibility for EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: EV充电设备的GSA符合性评定与50 Hz ECG电网兼容性
requirement_topic.zht: EV充電設備的GSA符合性評定與50 Hz ECG電網兼容性

summary.en: EV chargers imported into Ghana are subject to GSA conformity assessment and require a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) for customs clearance as electrical equipment. Ghana's grid operates at 50 Hz, 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase (ECG and NEDCo distribution networks). EV chargers must be configured for 50 Hz operation and comply with the Ghana Electrical Code (GEC 2018) for fixed installations. Installation must be carried out by a licensed electrician and inspected by the relevant authority. The GSA conformity route for EV chargers should be confirmed with a GSA-approved conformity assessment body before shipment, as the product category scope is evolving alongside Ghana's nascent EV market.
summary.zh: 进口加纳的电动汽车充电设备作为电气产品须经GSA符合性评定，并取得符合性证书（CoC）方可清关。加纳电网运行于50 Hz、230 V单相/400 V三相（ECG和NEDCo配电网）。电动汽车充电设备须配置为50 Hz运行，并遵守固定安装适用的《加纳电气规范》（GEC 2018）。安装须由持牌电气工程师完成并经相关主管机构检验。鉴于产品类别范围随加纳EV市场发展而演变，出货前应向GSA批准的符合性评定机构确认EV充电设备的GSA符合性路径。
summary.zht: 進口加納的電動汽車充電設備作為電氣產品須經GSA符合性評定，並取得符合性證書（CoC）方可清關。加納電網運行於50 Hz、230 V單相/400 V三相（ECG和NEDCo配電網）。電動汽車充電設備須配置為50 Hz運行，並遵守固定安裝適用的《加納電氣規範》（GEC 2018）。安裝須由持牌電氣工程師完成並經相關主管機構檢驗。鑒於產品類別範圍隨加納EV市場發展而演變，出貨前應向GSA批准的符合性評定機構確認EV充電設備的GSA符合性路徑。

standards_or_laws: Ghana Standards Authority (GSA) — conformity assessment for imported electrical equipment
Certificate of Conformity (CoC) for Ghana customs clearance
Ghana Electrical Code (GEC 2018) — fixed electrical installation requirements
ECG / NEDCo 50 Hz distribution grid technical requirements

summary.en: Chinese EV chargers designed for the domestic market are rated for 50 Hz operation and 220 V / 380 V, which is broadly compatible with Ghana's grid voltage levels. However, Chinese domestic GB/T 18487 certificates and CQC marks do not substitute for Ghana GSA conformity documents. The exporter should confirm 50 Hz compatibility in the technical datasheet and obtain a Ghana CoC from a GSA-approved body.
summary.zh: 中国国内市场电动汽车充电设备额定为50 Hz运行、220 V / 380 V，与加纳电网电压水平大体兼容。但中国国内GB/T 18487证书和CQC标志不能替代加纳GSA符合性文件。出口商应在技术规格表中确认50 Hz兼容性，并从GSA批准机构取得加纳CoC。
summary.zht: 中國國內市場電動汽車充電設備額定為50 Hz運行、220 V / 380 V，與加納電網電壓水平大體兼容。但中國國內GB/T 18487證書和CQC標誌不能替代加納GSA符合性文件。出口商應在技術規格表中確認50 Hz兼容性，並從GSA批准機構取得加納CoC。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2015 (50 Hz compatible for Chinese domestic market)
CQC product certification (voluntary, domestic China)

gap.en: The exporter must confirm 50 Hz grid compatibility in the charger datasheet, engage a GSA-approved conformity assessment body to determine the applicable CoC route for EV chargers, and ensure the Ghana buyer arranges licensed electrician installation and local inspection per GEC 2018. Chinese domestic certificates do not clear Ghanaian customs.
gap.zh: 出口商须在充电设备技术规格表中确认50 Hz电网兼容性，委托GSA批准的符合性评定机构确认EV充电设备适用的CoC路径，并确保加纳买方按《GEC 2018》安排持牌电气工程师安装和当地检验。中国国内证书不能用于加纳清关。
gap.zht: 出口商須在充電設備技術規格表中確認50 Hz電網兼容性，委託GSA批准的符合性評定機構確認EV充電設備適用的CoC路徑，並確保加納買方按《GEC 2018》安排持牌電氣工程師安裝和當地檢驗。中國國內證書不能用於加納清關。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory: GSA CoC required for customs clearance; GEC 2018 compliance required for fixed installation; 50 Hz configuration required for ECG/NEDCo grid compatibility
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 is mandatory for EV chargers in the Chinese domestic market; CQC is voluntary; 50 Hz is the standard for both China and Ghana

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EV chargers imported into Ghana require a GSA Certificate of Conformity at customs and GEC 2018-compliant fixed installation. Confirm 50 Hz compatibility in the datasheet and engage a GSA-approved body before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进口加纳的电动汽车充电设备须在海关取得GSA符合性证书，固定安装须符合GEC 2018。出货前应在技术规格表中确认50 Hz兼容性，并委托GSA批准机构。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進口加納的電動汽車充電設備須在海關取得GSA符合性證書，固定安裝須符合GEC 2018。出貨前應在技術規格表中確認50 Hz兼容性，並委託GSA批准機構。
